mapper.sql: select menu_id, menu_name, parent_id, order_num, path, component, menu_type, icon, create_time from menu
mapper.select:
AND menu_name like concat('%', #{menuName}, '%')
order by parent_id, order_num

select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.create_time from menu m left join role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id left join user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id left join role ro on ur.role_id = ro.role_id
AND ur.user_id like concat('%', #{userId}, '%')
AND m.menu_name like concat('%', #{menuName}, '%')
order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.create_time from menu m left join role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id left join user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id left join user u on ur.user_id = u.user_id where u.user_id = #{userId} and m.menu_type in ('M', 'C') order by m.parent_id, m.order_num
select m.menu_id from menu m left join role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id where rm.role_id = #{roleId} order by m.parent_id, m.order_num
select count(1) from menu where parent_id = #{menuId}
mapper.insert: insert into menu( menu_id, parent_id, menu_name, order_num, path, component, menu_type, icon, create_time )values( #{menuId}, #{parentId}, #{menuName}, #{orderNum}, #{path}, #{component}, #{menuType}, #{icon}, sysdate() )
